signals.headline: Incoming BOK Governor Nominee Warns of Accelerating Headline Inflation | NO | LOW confidence**
signals.raw:
Incoming BOK Governor Nominee Warns of Accelerating Headline Inflation | NO | LOW confidence**  
On April 15, 2026 (per "Wednesday"), nominee Shin Hyun-song stated consumer inflation is likely to accelerate, amid record foreign outflows and won weakness.[2][4]  
No formal confirmation or policy shift; nominee status and vague timing limit immediate prediction market impact.[4]

Fed March FOMC Minutes Show Some Rate Hike Talks if Inflation Exceeds 2% | NO | MED confidence**
